questions.question: What event is announced in heaven with great rejoicing?
options: The wedding supper of the Lamb
questions.correct: The wedding supper of the Lamb
questions.feedback: The wedding of the Lamb has come, and his bride has made herself ready.

questions.question: What name is written on the rider of the white horse?
options: King of Kings and Lord of Lords
questions.correct: King of Kings and Lord of Lords
questions.feedback: On his robe and thigh: KING OF KINGS AND LORD OF LORDS.

questions.question: The beast and the false prophet were thrown into the lake of fire.
questions.feedback: The beast and the false prophet were thrown alive into the fiery lake of burning sulfur.

questions.question: The rider's name is the _____ of God.
questions.feedback: His name is the Word of God.

questions.question: The fine linen the bride wears represents the righteous _____ of God's holy people.
questions.feedback: Fine linen stands for the righteous acts of God's holy people.
